message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

title Test() Sequence Diagram

participant "LCM" as LCM
rectangle "Class\nApplicationProperty" #LightGreen {
    participant "Class\nApplicationProperty" as AppProp
}
rectangle "Class\nDscResourceBase" #Lavender {
    participant "Class\nDscResourceBase" as DscResBase
}
rectangle "Function\nConvertTo-HashtableFromObject" #Lavender {
    participant "Function\nConvertTo-HashtableFromObject" as ConvertFunc
}
rectangle "Function\nTest-DscParameterState" #Lavender {
    participant "Function\nTest-DscParameterState" as TestFunc
}

== Main Flow ==
LCM -> AppProp: ApplicationProperty.Test()
activate AppProp

AppProp -> DscResBase: ([DscResourceBase] $this).Test()
activate DscResBase

== Internal Processing in DscResourceBase ==
DscResBase -> ConvertFunc: $this
activate ConvertFunc
ConvertFunc --> DscResBase: Return Type: [Hashtable]
deactivate ConvertFunc

DscResBase -> DscResBase: $actual = $this.Get()
DscResBase -> ConvertFunc: $actual
activate ConvertFunc
ConvertFunc --> DscResBase: Return Type: [Hashtable]
deactivate ConvertFunc

== Parameter State Testing ==
DscResBase -> TestFunc: Parameter: both Hashtables
activate TestFunc
note right of TestFunc: DscResourceBase must determine which properties\nare optional to exclude them the comparison.
TestFunc --> DscResBase: Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate TestFunc

== Return Flow ==
DscResBase --> AppProp: Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate DscResBase
AppProp --> LCM: Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate AppProp

@enduml
```
